practice.name: Problem 3 (1983 AIME)
practice.statement: What is the product of the real roots of the equation (x^2 - 10x + 22)^2 = 4(x^2 - 10x + 6)?

practice.name: Problem 14 (2023 AMC 12B)
practice.statement: For how many ordered pairs of integers (a, b) does the polynomial x^3 + ax + b have three distinct integer roots?

practice.name: Problem 18 (2003 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: What is the sum of the reciprocals of the roots of the equation $\frac{2003}{2004}x+1+\frac{1}{x}=0$?

practice.name: Problem 5 (2020 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: What is the sum of all real numbers $x$ for which $|x^2-12x+34|=2?$

practice.name: Problem 6 (2002 AMC 12B)
practice.statement: Suppose that a and b are nonzero real numbers, and that the equation x^2 + ax + b = 0 has solutions a and b. Then the pair (a, b) is:
